//readmodel: This module keeps a per-tenant, newest-first log of grounded answers, fed exclusively by BrainAnswered events on the bus. The Brain Query agent (agent.brain) produces those answers via RAG + the LLM Gateway over HTTP; this module never touches the AI layer.

api.//tenant: The tenant is resolved by the gateway from the 'X-FactoryOS-Tenant' header (preferred) or the 'tenant' query fallback shown below; a request with no resolvable tenant is rejected with 400.
api.ask: POST /m/brain/ask   body: { "question": "Why did press-1 spike last night?", "askedBy": "user:mehmet" }   (header X-FactoryOS-Tenant: <tenant>)  ->  202 { tenant, questionId, question }
api.summary: GET /m/brain/summary   (header X-FactoryOS-Tenant: <tenant>)  ->  { tenant, total, byModel: [ { model, count }, ... ] } — a per-model tally for an at-a-glance strip.
